ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the athlete represents */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete (in meters) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete (in kilograms) */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand (e.g., left, right) */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Dominant foot (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the coach is from */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_coaches" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's member ID */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach's ID */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach started coaching the athlete */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach stopped coaching the athlete (null if still coaching) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_types" (
  "competition_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition type */,
  "competition_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "competition_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition type's ID */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_competition_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_type_id") REFERENCES competition_types ("competition_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition result */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's member ID */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition's ID */,
  "match_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the match (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank achieved by the athlete in the competition */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the athlete */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Prize money awarded to the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES athletes ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's member ID */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition's ID */,
  "ter" INTEGER /* Technical Event Rating (TER) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score achieved by the athlete */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated from performances */,
  "sb" INTEGER /* Score Bonus (SB) */,
  "performance" INTEGER /* Overall performance score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES athletes ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's member ID */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition's ID */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match's ID */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces hit by the athlete */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults committed by the athlete */,
  "first_serve_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of first serves made by the athlete */,
  "second_serve_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of second serves made by the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES athletes ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)
